actions.name: get_paper
actions.description: Get one arXiv paper by arXiv identifier.

id.description: The arXiv identifier to fetch, such as 2301.00001 or 2301.00001v1.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting one arXiv paper.

found.description: Whether arXiv returned a paper for the requested identifier.

id.description: The versioned arXiv identifier, such as 2301.00001v1.

baseId.description: The arXiv identifier without the version suffix.

anyOf.description: The arXiv version number when present.

publishedAt.description: The paper publication timestamp from arXiv.

updatedAt.description: The paper update timestamp from arXiv.

categories.description: The arXiv category terms assigned to the paper.

anyOf.description: The primary arXiv category term.
The arXiv PDF URL when arXiv provides one.
The DOI returned by arXiv when present.
The journal reference returned by arXiv when present.
The author comment returned by arXiv when present.
A normalized arXiv paper.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting one arXiv paper.

actions.name: get_papers
actions.description: Get multiple arXiv papers by arXiv identifiers.

items.description: The arXiv identifier to fetch, such as 2301.00001 or 2301.00001v1.

maxResults.description: The maximum number of papers to return.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting multiple arXiv papers.

totalResults.description: The total number of results reported by arXiv.

startIndex.description: The zero-based start index reported by arXiv.

itemsPerPage.description: The result page size reported by arXiv.

id.description: The versioned arXiv identifier, such as 2301.00001v1.

baseId.description: The arXiv identifier without the version suffix.

anyOf.description: The arXiv version number when present.

publishedAt.description: The paper publication timestamp from arXiv.

updatedAt.description: The paper update timestamp from arXiv.

categories.description: The arXiv category terms assigned to the paper.

anyOf.description: The primary arXiv category term.
The arXiv PDF URL when arXiv provides one.
The DOI returned by arXiv when present.
The journal reference returned by arXiv when present.
The author comment returned by arXiv when present.

papers.description: The normalized arXiv papers returned by the query.

outputSchema.description: The response returned by an arXiv query.

start.description: The zero-based result offset to request.

maxResults.description: The maximum number of papers to return.
